<!--
Thanks for contributing to InferPlan! Please fill this in and delete the
comments. Keep PRs focused — one change per PR is easiest to review.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- A short description, and the issue it closes (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] If I changed or added a **formula**, it has a matching test in
      `src/engine/engine.test.ts`, pinned to a published or measured number
      where possible (see `docs/FORMULAS.md`).
- [ ] If I changed a **URL parameter**, existing shared links still parse
      (round-trip tests in `src/state/url.test.ts`).
- [ ] If I changed the **UI**, I checked it in both light and dark themes.
- [ ] If I added a **model or GPU**, I cited the source for its specs.
